note: Caught from the wild in commercial fishing. ~half used for reduction to fishmeal/oil (see feed-fish footnote).
Finfish slaughtered for food. Up nine-fold since 1990. 2022 central ~133B.

Mussels, oysters, clams, scallops. Sentience an OPEN question (filter-feeders, often sessile). 2022 central within 700B mollusc total.
Snails etc. Part of 2022 mollusc total.
Mollusca NEI not otherwise classified. Part of 2022 mollusc total.
